title: Antigravity SDK: Building a digital simulated world
summary: Google unveiled the Antigravity SDK at Google I/O, which enables building multi-agent social simulations with virtual avatars interacting autonomously in simulated environments. The demo featured attendees represented as avatars in a simulated space station.
writeup: The video covers Google's Antigravity SDK, introduced at Google I/O for building multi-agent social simulations in which virtual avatars interact autonomously inside simulated environments. The demo placed attendees as avatars in a simulated space station, showing how the SDK coordinates multiple AI agents within a shared virtual world. The takeaway is a toolkit aimed at constructing digital simulated worlds populated by autonomous agents.
